title: Cordyloblaste confusa
taxonomy: Cordyloblaste confusa is a species of coniferous tree that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. It is native to Taiwan and is a member of the genus Cordyloblaste. The species is closely related to the genus Afrocarpus and is often classified as a member of the Afrocarpus-Cordyloblaste clade. This classification is based on molecular phylogenetic studies that have helped to resolve the relationships among these coniferous tree species. Further research may provide more information about the classification and evolutionary history of Cordyloblaste confusa.
benefits: Cordyloblaste confusa, a species of tree found in the Himalayas, is known to have various health benefits.
